title: Twilight Hollow
description: A cozy, vanilla-styled Minecraft modpack for horror enthusiasts.
body:
**Twilight Hollow: A cozy, vanilla-styled Minecraft modpack for horror enthusiasts.**

This modpack includes quite a few mods that aim to make your game creepy and scary, but also cozy and comfy at times. This modpack is a slow-burn, and is made for long playthroughs rather than short sessions or single videos. There's lots to be scared of, but most of it is avoidable if you're smart about it. (Updated gallery coming soon...)

This modpack is compatible with Distant Horizons and Simple Clouds, so if you'd like to use them you can install them manually! If you do install Simple Clouds, you will need to disable Iris. VR support is built-in.

This modpack is inspired by [Gargin](https://www.youtube.com/@Gargin), [The Librarian](https://www.youtube.com/@TheLibrarianYT), [IDK Someguy](https://www.youtube.com/@idk_someguy), [Stoopsky](https://www.youtube.com/@stoopsky) and [Jaden](https://www.youtube.com/@9JayDot8), [StereoTypical](https://www.youtube.com/@StereotypicalMC), and a lot of creepypastas such as Herobrine.

(NOTE: Please allocate at least 4gb of RAM to your instance, recommended 6-8gb total.)


<details>
<summary>SPOILERS FOR THOSE WHO WANT TO GO INTO THIS EXPERIENCE BLIND:</summary>

Includes From the Fog, the Cave Dweller ReEvolved, Vivecraft, The Twilight Forest, The Undergarden, Deeper and Darker, a few performance & QoL mods, and Essential.

There are also pre-installed shaderpacks and texture packs that you can enable, disable, and configure to your preference.

</details>
